name: link
description: Pressable text link with size presets and underline variants (none, hover, always).

props.name: children
props.description: The text content of the link

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset that maps to text variants (caption, body, bodyLarge)

props.name: underline
props.description: Controls when the underline decoration is shown

props.name: color
props.description: Custom color override; defaults to primary theme color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables press interaction and applies disabled text color
